schemaVersion.description: Version of the artifact metadata or result contract.

kind.description: Artifact metadata or result payload kind.

exitCode.description: Process exit code when this YAML describes a commandResult.

stdout.description: Captured stdout when this YAML describes a commandResult.

stderr.description: Captured stderr when this YAML describes a commandResult.

artifact.description: Artifact path metadata for scenario-adjacent notes.

metadata.description: Free-form metadata consumed by a scenario, suite, or human review.
